name: l76-core-arch
author: openclaw
description: Demonstration skill showcasing complete AgentSkills core architecture. Includes SKILL.md structure, main entry logic, tool integration patterns, error handling, and production-ready patterns. Use as a template for building new skills.
features: Complete SKILL.md structure with frontmatter standards
Main entry logic with StateManager and SkillExecutor classes
5 tool integration patterns (Sequential, Conditional, Error Recovery, Batch, State)
Comprehensive error handling strategy with 3 categories
Validation scripts for PowerShell and Bash

changes: Initial release: complete skill architecture template
Error handling strategy with categorized errors
Real-world skill examples (File Organizer, Git Hygiene, Health Check)
